channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The most reassuring argument about AI and jobs quietly explains why Gen Z can’t get one
item.description: It's not just the Jevons Paradox — it's also the lump of labor fallacy. But there's no God-given right for entry-level work to exist.

item.title: This summer’s heat is a live stress test for data centers — here’s what it’s revealing in real time
item.description: Almost 80% of global data centers face some form of climate risk, and it could cost developers trillions in the coming decades.

item.title: ‘Cop on your wrist’— Wearables offer tons of data but people are still going to sleep to Netflix and TikTok
item.description: A group of experts at Fortune’s Brainstorm Tech event in Aspen pinpointed a problem: People have more data than ever from their wearables, but nobody knows what to do with it.

item.title: Supreme Court upholds Fed independence by protecting Lisa Cook's role, averting U.S. debt crisis
item.description: The court's decision reinforces that both the fact and appearance of independence are vital to the Federal Reserve's design.
